title: FarmERP is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: FarmERP is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
FarmERP invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FarmERP:
FarmERP is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP!
